Epic Name: and Evidence Smart Contracts for immutable ledger.

Description: Spin up local ethereum node using truffle-config for local development.
Develop storeEvidence and getEvidence signatures in solidity.
Restrict frontend access to only valid Google Accounts.
Clicking 'Export Report' outputs a court-ready cryptographic PDF using jsPDF.
Connect backend route to IPFS to distribute evidence files and retrieve CIDs.
Intercept file buffer from frontend and pipe to NodeClam for virus scanning before hashing.
Require two cryptographic approvals for transfer of evidence physical custody.
Use Lucide-react icons and active tab states.
Add hdwallet-provider and Alchemy URL to config.
